D1.rationale: Per-AC breakdown for 11 ACs. 9 PASS with artifacts, 2 pending (AC8/AC10) at submission. Exceeds 'at most 1 gap' for D1=4.

D2.rationale: 2 reviewer files (code-reviewer, ux-expert) with specific findings. But both are Alex-side (design phase), not post-impl. No acceptance-tests, no traces.

D3.rationale: Core steps documented. Layer 1 self-check present. But Layer 2 was Alex design-time, not post-impl Blake review. Sequence informality.

D4.rationale: 2 pending ACs honestly disclosed. 2 implementation decisions documented. But deviations lack formal rationale/impact. No gate4_delta field.

D5.rationale: Concrete discovery: 'Express Handoff is NOT Review-Exemption'. Written to architecture.md. Variabilizable. Failure_mode semantics present but no formal schema.
